name: top pid readout
top setpoint cmd
store top sp
func: global.set("xsc_sp_top", Number(msg.payload)); return null;

name: store top gains
top gains cmd
func:
var g = global.get("xsc_gains_top") || {};
return { topic: "xsphere/commands/pid/top/gains", payload: g };

name: bottom pid readout

store bottom sp

name: store bottom gains

name: gradient mode cmd
func: return { topic: "xsphere/commands/gradient/mode", payload: { mode: msg.payload ? "gradient" : "absolute" } };
